data.title: Global Beverage Container Recycling Market valued at $26.3 billion in 2024, projected to reach $49.5 billion by 2034 with 6.3% CAGR growth. Opportunity driven by environmental consciousness and waste regulations.
data.description: A recent report on the Beverage Container Recycling Market predicts significant growth opportunities in the industry. Valued at USD 26.3 billion in 2024, the global market is projected to expand at a CAGR of 6.3%, reaching USD 49.5 billion by 2034. Factors contributing to this growth include increasing environmental awareness, stringent waste-management policies, and a notable shift towards sustainability practices. The industry trend analysis and forecast indicate a positive outlook for the sector in the coming years.

data.title: Waterline Renewal Technologies gets BMEC approval for Perma-Lateral™ Lining Systems and LightRay® UV CIPP Technologies in Ottawa.
data.description: In Ottawa, Illinois, on December 11, 2025, it was reported that Waterline Renewal Technologies received approval from the Ontario Building Materials Evaluation Commission (BMEC) for their Perma-Lateral™ Lining Systems and LightRay® UV cure technologies. This authorization allows these technologies to be used in the region. This news showcases a significant milestone for the company, emphasizing their commitment to innovation and industry standards.

data.title: FDA clears NUZ-001 for entry into HEALEY ALS Platform Trial. NUZ-001 as Regimen I in trial. Next steps include single IRB approval and site initiations.
data.description: In a significant development, the FDA has finished evaluating the Neurizon NUZ-001 regimen for inclusion in the HEALEY ALS Platform Trial Master Protocol. NUZ-001 has been designated as Regimen I in the trial, paving the way for its formal entry. The next phase involves securing approval from a single Institutional Review Board (IRB), as well as initiating sites for the trial. This milestone signifies a crucial step forward in the progression of the HEALEY ALS Platform Trial.

data.title: Drew Barrymore joins MSC Cruises for launch of MSC World Atlantic sailing from Port Canaveral in November 2027, with new features onboard.
data.description: The MSC World Atlantic is set to commence its voyages from Port Canaveral on November 13, 2027, offering year-round itineraries open for booking. Drew Barrymore, the godmother of MSC World America, celebrated the news in her own unique fashion. The ship will introduce the innovative Viva La Musica venue and exclusive new-to-market experiences.

data.title: What's in store for Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Solana on Myriad? Predictions on key markets, including Ethereum's future and Bitcoin's potential return to $100K.
data.description: This week, significant focus on Myriad is on Ethereum’s future direction with forecasts. Speculations are also abound on whether Bitcoin will surge back to $100,000. Additionally, attention is drawn towards Solana and its upcoming achievement.

data.title: Ashley Gibson Barnett Museum of Art in Lakeland, Fla. to host Medici Dynasty exhibit from Dec. 13, 2025, to April 12, 2026.
data.description: Located in Lakeland, Florida, the Ashley Gibson Barnett Museum of Art at Florida Southern College is excited to unveil The Medici Dynasty: Renaissance in Florence exhibition. Running from December 13, 2025, to April 12, 2026, this exclusive showcase delves into the rich history of the Medici family during the Renaissance era.

data.title: Clara Capital launches same-day ISO commissions, extends terms to 12 months, and introduces new pricing tiers.
data.description: Woodbury, New York - Clara Capital, a top provider of tailored financing options for small and medium-sized businesses, revealed significant improvements to its offerings. They are now providing same-day commission payments for ISOs, extended 12-month terms, and revised pricing tiers with reduced rates. These updates demonstrate Clara Capital's dedication to meeting ISO suggestions, enhancing automation, and providing competitive solutions.

data.title: ETH price may triple as ETF inflows resume. Taker volume up. Will futures market boost rally to new highs?
data.description: The latest data shows an increase in inflows for the Spot ETH ETF, with a noticeable rise in demand for taker volume. This development prompts speculation on whether the Ether futures markets will mimic this trend, potentially initiating a surge towards surpassing previous all-time highs.

data.title: Kentucky's reliance on coal-fired plants no longer cheapest option. Study suggests investing in renewables for cheaper, reliable electricity.
data.description: A recent study conducted in Kentucky has revealed that investing in additional renewable energy sources, battery storage, and demand-side resources could effectively reduce electricity costs for residents in the state. The report, released on Dec. 11, 2025, in Frankfort, Kentucky, suggests that incorporating these alternative energy solutions could lead to a decrease in electricity expenses while ensuring the reliability of the grid for Kentucky residents. Embracing renewable energy technologies could significantly benefit consumers by providing an efficient and cost-effective energy solution. This study underscores the potential for these initiatives to positively impact the state's electricity sector, highlighting the importance of transitioning towards sustainable energy alternatives. Residents of Kentucky could potentially experience lower electricity costs by implementing these measures, ultimately creating a more sustainable and affordable energy system for the state's population.

data.title: J.P. Morgan chooses Solana for Galaxy's tokenized corporate bond issuance, in one of the first transactions of its kind in the growing onchain debt sector. #finance #blockchain
data.description: This groundbreaking transaction involves the tokenization of a commercial bond, marking an early move in the emerging sector of on-chain debt and credit instruments. It represents an innovative development in the sector, where assets are converted into digital tokens for trading and investment purposes. This milestone transaction sets the stage for further advancements in the sector and highlights the growing importance of blockchain technology in the financial industry.

data.title: Pixalate's Nov 2025 LATAM SSP report ranks Google Ad Exchange top on Google Play Store with 97% access.
data.description: Pixalate has recently unveiled the November 2025 rankings for Sell-Side Platforms (SSPs) offering 'Direct' access to the top 100 mobile apps in Latin America (LATAM). The report delves into the leading Supply-Side Platforms (SSPs) in LATAM that maintain direct-seller relationships with mobile apps in the Top 100 of Pixalate's Publisher Trust Index for the said month. In compiling this analysis, Pixalate's data science team scrutinized app-ads.txt files from over 600 mobile apps featured in the Publisher Trust Index. According to the report, in November 2025, the top SSPs with direct access in LATAM are Google Ad Exchange holding the first position with 97% and Magnite following closely with 96% access. For a more detailed overview, the complete story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Fed's frequent communications on market impact questioned. Should Federal Reserve reduce talks?
data.description: Following another rate cut by the Federal Reserve, the market experienced a relief rally. However, concerns have been raised about the frequency of the Fed's press conferences regarding the market. Some argue that the Federal Reserve should reduce its communication to avoid influencing market movements.

data.title: Google stock fell due to OpenAI model release and Disney investment, along with AI stock pullback initiated by Oracle.
data.description: The stock of Google experienced a decline after OpenAI introduced a new AI model and received an investment from Disney. Additionally, a decrease in AI stocks influenced by Oracle contributed to the downturn. This development resulted in Google stock dropping as reported in an article titled "Google Stock Dips Amid OpenAI Model Upgrade In Leadership Battle."

data.title: Global Space Power Supply Market valued at USD 3.3 billion in 2024, projected to reach USD 7.3 billion by 2034 with 8.2% CAGR, due to growing satellite launches and demand for CubeSats.
data.description: Dublin - A report on the Space Power Supply Market has been made available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. The Global Space Power Supply Market, valued at USD 3.3 billion in 2024, is projected to achieve a CAGR of 8.2% and reach USD 7.3 billion by 2034. Factors contributing to this growth include the rise in satellite launches, advancements in photovoltaic technologies, expanding use of CubeSats and small satellites, and an overall increase in the demand for space power supply solutions.

data.title: First Horizon Corporation (NYSE: FHN) named 2025 Forbes Best-In-State Employer for Tennessee. Recognition from Forbes and Statista Inc.
data.description: First Horizon Corporation (NYSE: FHN), based in Memphis, Tennessee, has been named a 2025 Best-in-State Employer for Tennessee by Forbes and Statista Inc. This recognition highlights First Horizon's commitment to excellence in workplace culture and management. This accolade marks a significant achievement for the corporation in ensuring employee satisfaction and career growth. FHN's inclusion in this list showcases its dedication to providing a positive and rewarding work environment in Tennessee.

data.title: Cartier Silver Corp (CSE:CFE) grants 3,430,000 stock options at $0.24 per share to directors, officers, and consultants until Dec 11, 2030.
data.description: On December 11, 2025, Cartier Silver Corporation (CSE:CFE) disclosed the provision of stock options to directors, officers, and consultants, enabling them to procure a total of 3,430,000 common shares of the company. These options are valid for exercise at $0.24 per share until December 11, 2030. The allotment adheres to Cartier Silver’s stock option plan and complies with regulatory standards, entailing that any shares acquired through option exercise will be subject to a resale limitation for a span of four months post grant date.

NY Fed: Desk Plans To Conduct Approximately $14.4 Bln In Reinvestment Purchases Between Dec 12 And Jan 14 - Desk Plans To Conduct Additional Approximately $40 Bln In Reserve Management Purchases Between Dec 12 And Jan 14

data.title: PG&E showcases innovative grid tech to enhance reliability and capacity, prep for extreme weather. - Calif., Dec. 11, 2025.
data.description: In an effort to enhance reliability and increase capacity, a technology demonstration was recently introduced in California. Pacific Gas and Electric Company shared news of the successful launch on Dec. 11, 2025. The project aims to prepare the state's grid for extreme weather conditions and facilitate the integration of more renewable energy sources. This initiative seeks to boost the resilience of the grid while accommodating the increase in renewable energy.
GRAND JURY DECLINES INDICTMENT AGAINST NEW YORK ATTORNEY GENERAL JAMES FOR SECOND TIME-SOURCES
New York Fed: The desk plans to conduct additional approximately $40 billion in reserve management purchases between December 12th and January 14th.
